creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed all the ones I could.

Coro's author decided that starting at 5.22, he was forking Perl and that to use Coro, you would have to use his Perl.  So I'll consider it a lost cause.

The other three are non trivial to fix, and they've had issues opened about the 5.22+ compability for a long time.
